case_title: BASHIROV, FARIT VS MILTER, VICTOR IND. & DBA (BEST AUTO REPAIR)

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $142.58 FILED BY BASHIROV, FARIT AS TO DEFENDANT MILTER, VICTOR IND. & DBA (BEST AUTO REPAIR) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-16-2003 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
